candidates.title: Three-layer architecture pattern for LLM knowledge bases
candidates.description: Raw sources (immutable) -> Wiki (LLM-owned) -> Schema (co-evolved config). Clean separation where human curates and LLM maintains.
candidates.extraction_action: Compare against SoNash's current architecture (.research/ = raw sources, docs/ + MEMORY.md = wiki layer, CLAUDE.md = schema). Identify gaps.

candidates.title: Ingest-Query-Lint operational triad
candidates.description: Three operations that keep a knowledge base healthy: ingest new sources, query with compounding answers, lint for contradictions/orphans/staleness.
candidates.extraction_action: Map to existing skills: /repo-analysis + /website-analysis = ingest, /deep-research = query, orphan detection + /alerts = lint. Identify missing lint operations.

candidates.title: Answers-compound-into-wiki principle
candidates.description: Good query answers should be filed back as wiki pages. Explorations compound alongside ingested sources. Prevents knowledge loss to chat history.
candidates.extraction_action: Evaluate: do /deep-research outputs, /brainstorm sessions, and /deep-plan decisions persist as reusable knowledge? Or do they die in .research/ archives?

candidates.title: Index + Log dual navigation system
candidates.description: Content-oriented index (catalog with summaries) + chronological log (append-only, parseable). Works without embedding infrastructure at moderate scale.
candidates.extraction_action: Compare: DOCUMENTATION_INDEX.md = index, SESSION_HISTORY.md + commit-log.jsonl = log, research-index.jsonl = research index. What's missing?

candidates.title: qmd local markdown search (MCP + CLI)
candidates.description: BM25/vector hybrid search for markdown files with LLM re-ranking. Both CLI and MCP server. github.com/tobi/qmd.
candidates.extraction_action: Evaluate for JASON-OS search layer. Currently using Grep + DOCUMENTATION_INDEX.md. At 1000+ docs, may need proper search.
